hero.headline: See Every Village Before Problems Become Crises.
hero.description: GramDrishti is an AI-powered rural intelligence platform combining satellite imagery, Google Earth Engine, environmental analytics, and artificial intelligence to monitor villages in real time.

features.headline: Core Capabilities
features.subheadline: Everything you need to monitor and plan for climate resilience at the village level.

item1.title: Real-time Satellite Analysis
item1.desc: Process multispectral imagery on the fly for any village in India.

item2.title: AI-Powered Insights
item2.desc: Translate complex environmental metrics into plain-language actionable intelligence.

item3.title: Change Detection
item3.desc: Track historical trends in vegetation and surface water over five years.

item4.title: Automated Reports
item4.desc: Generate comprehensive PDF assessments with one click for policy making.

howItWorks.headline: How It Works
howItWorks.subheadline: A seamless pipeline from raw coordinates to actionable intelligence in seconds.

step1.title: Search Village
step1.desc: Find any village in India instantly.

step2.title: Fetch Satellite Data
step2.desc: Pull GEE metrics on the fly.

technology.headline: Technology Stack
technology.subheadline: Built on a modern, scalable, and powerful geospatial architecture.

cta.headline: Start Monitoring Villages Intelligently
cta.subheadline: Join GramDrishti today and transform how rural environmental planning is executed.

footer.description: AI-powered Climate Intelligence Platform for Indian villages.
